description: The 'Ndrina Gallelli is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Badolato in the province of Catanzaro, Calabria. It is involved in criminal activities such as extortion and fraud, including illicitly obtaining European Union funds. The clan has been targeted by law enforcement operations like Itaca-Freeboat and Pietranera, leading to arrests and convictions. As of 2017, its alleged boss Vincenzo Gallelli was imprisoned.
